title: IC Partners
description: icpartners.it rocketreach.co/icadvisory-services-india-pvt-ltd-profile_b5c0f34ff42e08a0 IC&Partners is an Italian management consulting firm founded in 1999, headquartered in Udine and Milan, specializing in internationalization strategies for SMEs and large companies. With 27 subsidiaries across Central & Eastern Europe, Russia, China, South Asia, and the Americas, they provide tax, legal, accounting, financial, and HR support for foreign market entry.
